rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'Strong mBART baseline').
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unsupported claim about the importance of in-line API calls).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
